hero.title: Report violations against cyclists
hero.subtitle: Your report strengthens the safety of those who ride
stats.title: Collective Impact
step1.title: Register
step1.desc: Report the type of violation, location, and details of the incident
step2.title: Map It
step2.desc: Your report appears on the map to raise awareness among other cyclists
step3.title: Mobilize
step3.desc: The data helps push for urban mobility policies
hero.heading: CYCLIST, REPORT IT!
hero.description: Traffic violence doesn't start with a hit-and-run.
hero.secondLine: It's time to give <0>visibility</0> to what you experience on the streets.
email.banner.semEmail: Your account has no registered email.
apoiadores.label: Supporters ({count})
apoiador.label: Supporter {number}
welcome.title: So glad you're here!
welcome.description: We are a citizen platform that fosters Cycling Activism, focused on the urban cyclist and spreading information about existing initiatives. Find the community that welcomes you!
welcome.observation: Note: The data does not automatically generate formal reports. Look for <1>Cycling Activism Initiatives</1> already existing in your area, and strengthen local cycling activism with your experiences! <5>Formal reports: call the police.</5>
tour.welcome.title: 🚲 Welcome to Ciclista Denuncie!
tour.welcome.content: This is the Guided Tour! I'll show you the main features of the platform in just a few steps. Let's go?
tour.logo.title: The bicycle is alive and has many meanings here!
tour.logo.content: The Ciclista Denuncie logo. Click it three times to see our special bikefire animation!
tour.firebikes-brancas.title: 🕊️ White Bikes
tour.firebikes-brancas.content: The white bikes are tributes to cyclists and activists who were lost in traffic
tour.firebikes-vermelhas.title: 🚲 Red Bikes
tour.firebikes-vermelhas.content: The red bikes represent cyclists, activists and their families who fight to ride safely!
tour.contador.title: 📊 Registered Reports
tour.contador.content: This is the national report counter. The more reports, the stronger our cause. Click to see the map!
tour.cta.title: 🚨 Register a Report
tour.cta.content: This is the main button! Report traffic violence, poor infrastructure, or any incident against cyclists.
tour.apoiadores.title: 🤝 Supporters
tour.apoiadores.content: Meet the collectives, organizations, and people who support our cause. Hover to pause, click dots to navigate.
tour.navegacao.title: 🗺️ Navigation
tour.navegacao.content: Explore the report map, read our blog, or get in touch with us.
tour.idioma.title: 🌐 Language & Account
tour.idioma.content: Switch language (🇧🇷/🇺🇸) or log in to track your reports and access exclusive features.
tour.final.title: ✅ You're All Set!
tour.final.content: The tour is over! Now you know the main features. Register your first report and help build safer streets for cyclists! 🚲✊
